summary: Produced graphics segment, attributed on-screen to 'Full Measure with Sharyl Attkisson,' with animated text on a dark grid background. Large stylized text reads 'Illegal Immigrants Committed 5 Million Serious Crimes,' with small source citations listed at the bottom. The audio is narration. The tweet text describes an ICE operation, Operation Metro Surge, in Minnesota.

script.scene: Animated stylized text on a dark grid reading 'Illegal Immigrants Committed 5 Million Serious Crimes'; source citations at bottom; 'Full Measure' branding.
